title: Trading Card Inspector
desc: Inspect your way through dozens of unique, hilarious cards in this chilled-out papers-please-em-up! Identify and appraise cards from The World's Most Coolest TCG! Start your new job as an official Habubis Trading Card Inspector and uncover a tale of friendship, corporate espionage and murder?!

title: 8AM: The Warehouse
desc: "8AM: The Warehouse" is a suspense game set in a massive distribution center late at night. Monitor security cameras as strange incidents occur among the remaining workers — and decide if it’s exhaustion, system error, or something lurking between the shelves until 8:00 a.m.

title: UFO 50 Nonograms
desc:
UFO 50 Nonograms is an unofficial fangame of Mossmouth's UFO 50.

If you enjoy Nonograms and UFO 50, this game is quite literally made for you.

After a crash-landing on Zoldath, you must repair the Campanella by solving Nonogram puzzles. UFO 50 Nonograms is also an incremental game. As you solve puzzles, you will collect resources which will allow you help out others and craft upgrades.

title: Sumire's Secret
desc: When Sumire's teacher develops a one-sided obsession with her, her day-to-day becomes a 24/7 horror story without a hero... only victims and villains.

title: Helicopter Shooter: Hot Ace Heli War Borne
My Isekai Hotel
desc: Become the manager of your very own hotel from another world! Gather resources, play fun mini-games, expand your establishment, and keep your guests entertained. Build your reputation and create the ultimate otherworldly getaway!

title: Janky Horse
desc:
Junkyard Robot Janky Horses racing for glory ... what else do you need to know? An interactive streaming game that integrates with all major streaming platforms.

Part of the Snoodle-Doodle collection of Streaming Games.
